context.goal: Enter fullscreen mode from the File > Rotation submenu.
context.cues: TIAEditor v1.28 is open in a windowed blank workspace with the top menu bar visible and Viewmode shown at the bottom.

state_anchor.locator: windowed TIAEditor title bar and top toolbar

anchors.locator: File dropdown item 'Rotation' with submenu arrow

procedure.expect: File dropdown menu opens below the menu bar, showing items such as Open, Open recent, Pages, Rotation, and Exit.
Rotation submenu opens to the right, listing Rotate left, Rotate right, and FullScreen.
TIAEditor switches to fullscreen, filling the whole screen with the toolbar at the top and Viewmode status at the bottom.
